{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Archlord-level sacred instrument
| introduced = cradle-13-threshold
}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Flashing Knives leader]] wears an [[Archlord-level sacred instrument]] consisting of robes with silver threads of glistening chain and activated script.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 3</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
